item.title: The Will Smith Drama Keeps Getting Funnier
item.description: A lighthearted take on the ongoing Will Smith drama, with the tone kept playful and brand-safe.

item.title: The Most Extreme Cheek Filler Ever
item.description: A dramatic look at cheek filler taken to the extreme, with a beauty trend that’s hard to ignore.

item.title: Miley Cyrus' Movie About Nothing, Apparently
item.description: A cheeky take on Miley Cyrus' gross movie about nothing, with the kind of review that says a lot by saying very little.
